prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年内蒙古理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约198名→180名→202名→177名→168名，整体呈波动中缓慢上升趋势，近3年从202名提升至168名，累计前移约34名；2025年基准位次约168名，为近5年最优水平；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年均为10人，2026年增至11人，小幅扩招约10%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国科学技术大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第7名（2021–2026年），属全国顶尖高校（Top 20以内），办学层次极高；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，主要源于李政道先生逝世及其与中科大少年班的历史渊源，提升了学校文化声誉；抖音热度为高热（总排名第12，综合热度约418万），短视频曝光量大；2026年高考周期出现个别师德师风负面事件（教授贪污案），但属个案，整体声誉影响有限；历史投档异常记录中未见中科大出现断档或暴跌信号；第五轮学科评估中，中科大拥有A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科4个，A-学科7个，A-及以上共19个，学科实力极强；招生专业（理科试验班类、工科试验班、数学类、物理学类、计算机类、电子信息类等）均对应A+/A级学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，数学/统计为推荐，与中科大优势学科高度契合；内蒙古物理类考生2021年约7.08万→2025年约8.37万→2026年估算约11.09万（按历史比例72%估算），考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧；中科大位于安徽省合肥市，非内蒙古本省高校，在内蒙古招生占比极小（约0.2%），属跨省招生；内蒙古考生对华东地区顶尖高校的报考意愿总体稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次168名、2026年小幅扩招1人（+10%）、内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加（约+32.5%）以及学校声誉整体正面等因素，扩招对位次的推后效应与考生增加对位次的前移效应基本抵消；考虑到中科大在内蒙古招生名额极少（10–11人），位次波动受个别高分考生影响较大，且近两年位次已连续提升至历史最优水平，进一步大幅前移空间有限。预测2026年最低录取位次约178名，区间128–228名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含数学类/物理学类）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（含计算机类/电子信息类/人工智能）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（含物理学、应用物理学、天文学、光电信息科学与工程）
- 工科试验班（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（信息科技方向）（含电子信息工程、自动化）
- 理科试验班类（量子未来技术试点班）（含量子信息科学）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含化学类/生物科学类/空间科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约178名，区间128–228名。位次在区间下限（128名）附近可重点冲刺一档拔尖计划英才班和数学类等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约178名）建议以二档物理学类、工科试验班为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（228名）附近建议以三档电子信息类、量子信息等专业为主，争取进入中科大平台后再通过校内选拔转入心仪方向。中科大在内蒙古招生名额极少（11人），报考需精准定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia were approximately 198 → 180 → 202 → 177 → 168, showing a fluctuating but slowly rising trend. In the past three years, the ranking improved from 202 to 168, moving up by about 34 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 168, the best level in the past five years. The enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia's science (physics category) was 10 students from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 11 in 2026, a small expansion of about 10%, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for six consecutive years (2021–2026), placing it among the top national universities (within the top 20), with an extremely high academic level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was generally positive, mainly due to the passing of Mr. Li Zhengdao and his historical connection with USTC's Junior Class, which enhanced the university's cultural reputation. On Douyin, it has high popularity (ranked 12th overall, with a comprehensive heat index of about 4.18 million), indicating significant short video exposure. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were isolated negative incidents regarding teacher ethics (a professor's corruption case), but these were individual cases with limited overall reputation impact. Historical admission anomaly records show no signs of gaps or sharp declines for USTC. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, USTC has 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 4 A disciplines, and 7 A- disciplines, totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength. The enrollment majors (Science Experimental Class, Engineering Experimental Class, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.) all correspond to A+/A level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, while Mathematics/Statistics are recommended, highly consistent with USTC's advantageous disciplines. The number of physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia increased from approximately 70,800 in 2021 to about 83,700 in 2025, and is estimated to be around 110,900 in 2026 (estimated at 72% of the historical proportion), with a continuously expanding candidate pool and intensifying competition. USTC is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Inner Mongolia, and its enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is extremely small (about 0.2%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Inner Mongolian candidates' willingness to apply to top universities in the East China region is generally stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 168, the small enrollment expansion of 1 student in 2026 (+10%), the significant increase in physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia (about +32.5%), and the overall positive reputation of the university, the effect of enrollment expansion pushing the ranking back and the effect of increased candidates pushing the ranking forward largely offset each other. Given that USTC has very few enrollment spots in Inner Mongolia (10–11 students), ranking fluctuations are greatly influenced by individual high-scoring candidates, and the ranking has continuously improved to its historical best level in the past two years, further significant upward movement is limited. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 178, with a range of 128–228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Science Elite Class) (including Mathematics/Physics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Elite Class) (including Computer Science/Electronic Information/Artificial Intelligence)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (including Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Information Technology Direction) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Automation)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class) (including Quantum Information Science)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Program Science Elite Class) (including Chemistry/Biological Sciences/Space Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 178, with a range of 128–228. Candidates near the lower limit of the range (128) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Top Talent Elite Classes and Mathematics and other flagship majors. Candidates in the middle of the range (approximately 178) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Physics, Engineering Experimental Class, while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (228) are advised to focus on Tier 3 Electronic Information, Quantum Information, and other majors, aiming to enter the USTC platform first and then transfer to desired directions through internal selection. USTC has very few enrollment spots in Inner Mongolia (11 students), so applications require precise positioning.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
